name: Indian Spice Mixture
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely grind the mixture in a spice or coffee mill.
2. The mixture makes about 1/4 cup of spice mix.
3. Store leftover Indian Spice Mixture in an airtight jar in the refrigerator.
4. It can be used on broiled fish fillets, burritos or anything you would like to make hot and spicy.
